(14) +ÉÉÊvÉºÉÚSÉxÉÉ ºÉÆJªÉÉÆBÉE BÉEÉ.+ÉÉ. 3025 (+É) iÉÉ®ÉÒJÉ 28-12-2012 * MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department of Industrial Policy and Promotion) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th June, 2013 S.O. 1843(E).—In exercise of powers conferred by Section 14 of the Industries (Development and Regulation) Act, 1951 (65 of 1951), read with sub-rule (2) of rule 10 of the Registration and Licensing of Industrial Undertakings Rules, 1952, the Ministry of Industry (Department of Industrial Policy and Promotion) hereby makes the following further amendments to the notification of the Government of India in the former Ministry of Industry and Civil Supplies (Department of Industrial Development) No. S.O. 163(E) RLIU/10(2)/76 dated 3rd March, 1976, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) dated the 4th March, 1976, namely :— In the said notification, for the heading “LICENSING COMMITTEE” and the entries thereunder, the following shall be substituted, namely :— (6) ºÉÆ¤Ér ®ÉVªÉ ºÉ®BÉEÉ® BÉEä =tÉÉäMÉ ºÉÉÊSÉ´É ªÉÉ =ºÉBÉEÉ xÉÉàÉÉÊxÉnæÉÊ¶ÉiÉÉÒ - ºÉnºªÉ (7) ºÉÆªÉÖBÉDiÉ ºÉÉÊSÉ´É +ÉÉètÉÉäÉÊMÉBÉE +ÉxÉÖàÉÉänxÉ BÉEä ÉÊãÉA ºÉÉÊSÉ´ÉÉãÉªÉ BÉEÉ £ÉÉ®ºÉÉvÉBÉE * -ºÉnºªÉ ºÉÉÊSÉ´É” -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 “LICENSING COMMITTEE 1. Secretary, Department of Industrial Policy and Promotion, Ministry of Industry or his nominee —Chairperson 2. Secretary of the concerned Administrative Ministry or his nominee, not below the rank of Joint Secretary —Member 3. Secretary, Ministry of Home Affairs or his nominee, not below the rank of Joint Secretary —Member 4. Director General of Foreign Trade or his nominee, not below the rank of Joint Secretary —Member 5. Development Commissioner (Small Scale Industries), Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises or his nominee, not below the rank of Joint Secretary —Member 6. Industries Secretary or Commissioner Industries of the concerned State Government —Member 7. Joint Secretary, Secretariat for Industrial Assistance(SIA), Department of Industrial Policy & Promotion —Member-Secretary” [File No. 7(1)/2012-I.P.] SHUBHRA SINGH, Jt. Secy. Foot Note :—Principal notification published vide notification S.O. 163(E)/RLIU 10(2)/76 dated 3-3-1976.
